title: Remove k_panic from firmware
description:
Replace all k_panic() calls with graceful error handling per docs/LOGGING_STYLE.md 'No Panic Policy'.

Current k_panic locations:
- lora_l2.c: 8 calls (state machine, driver bug detection)
- lichen_l2.c: 2 calls (reinit_after_abort)

Pattern: LOG_ERR + set needs_reinit flag + return error, or store crash info and let watchdog reset.
